calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day Short Cause Trial sent forthwith from Department 206, request for default judgment against Defendant Elaine W Li.

Dept: 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Brown; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:09:54 a.m. and concluded at 10:17:07 a.m.

Roger Jackson, Esq. specially appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
Defendant Elaine W Li not appearing.
Pamela Ritter sworn to testify on behalf of the plaintiff.

Counsel to provide a brief summary of the case, list the causes of action and provide an offer of proof as to what the witness shall testify to.
Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: application for credit card.
Exhibit 2: credit card terms of agreement.
Exhibit 3: credit card statements.
Witness Pamela Ritter is called and confirms that declarations made, and counsel's summary is true and correct.

Upon totality of the evidence and by testimony, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendants as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant the following:
Damages $6,303.82
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $304.95
Total Judgment $6,608.77

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Set For Trial On Mar-11-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
